[{'text': "I'm facing south (-88.4°) and I can see the black wall is right below me. The robot is very close to the black obstacle. Looking at the map, the black wall between the two corridors seems to be solid at this position. 

Wait - I notice the robot rotated the wrong way. I used +90° which should be CCW (north), but the heading shows -88.4° which is south. That's correct for south.

Looking at the map image, the robot appears to be right at the edge of the black wall. The green destination is in the lower white corridor. Let me try a very small move south to see if there's a gap.

Actually, looking at the map more carefully, I think the black wall between the corridors might have a gap somewhere. Let me try moving south carefully.", 'type': 'text'}, {'id': 'toolu_017ZAAqdja6o4KtTWz9FjHYu', 'caller': {'type': 'direct'}, 'input': {'distance_meters': 0.3}, 'name': 'move_forward', 'type': 'tool_use'}]
